## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Validation

List the commands, platforms, or manual workflows used to verify the change.

## Security and Scope

- [ ] I used only synthetic data, controlled labs, or explicitly authorized systems.
- [ ] I removed credentials, private infrastructure details, captures, reports, and personal data.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavioral changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing changes.
- [ ] This change remains within the project's defensive and authorized-use scope.
